title: EDEN experiment runtime object
description: Observed runtime state of an EDEN experiment, distinct from the declarative experiment-config (experiment-config.schema.json). Carries the lifecycle state field introduced in 12a-3 (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §2.5). The split mirrors task vs task-payload: declarative input lives in the config, observed runtime in the experiment object.

state.description: Lifecycle state per 02-data-model.md §2.5. Default at creation is 'running'; the transition to 'terminated' is one-way in v0.

created_at.description: Wall-clock time at which the experiment was created. Used by deployment-supplied termination policies (e.g. max_wall_time) and not constrained beyond ISO-8601 UTC.
